title: Russia hopes Lindsey Graham’s death will advance Kremlin interests
summary_full: Graham had carried the reputation as the toughest Russia hawk in Washington since the 2018 death of his close friend and Senate ally John McCain.
summary_public: Graham had carried the reputation as the toughest Russia hawk in Washington since the 2018 death of his close friend and Senate ally John McCain.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia hopes Lindsey Graham’s death will advance Kremlin interests
